channel.title: 2026-05-23 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-05-23 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: The Neural Compiler: Program-to-Network Translation for Hybrid Scientific Machine Learning
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Lucas Sheneman
arXiv:2605.22498v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Scientific machine learning often requires combining known physics with unknown parameters or correction terms learned from data. Existing approaches either ignore known structure, encode it as a soft penalty, or require hand-written PyTorch code for each equation. We present The Neural Compiler, a system that translates programs written in a first-order Scheme-like expression language into frozen, differentiable PyTorch modules. These modules match the source program to floating-point precision and provide gradients through autograd. In hybrid models, the compiled module encodes known physics exactly while learned components model the unknown remainder. We evaluate the compiler across six experiment domains: Feynman physics equations, Lotka…

item.title: Engineering Hybrid Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Next-Generation Electricity Systems: A State-of-the-Art Review
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Joseph Nyangon
arXiv:2605.21903v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The integration of machine learning with domain-specific physics is transforming the design, monitoring, and control of electricity systems, where data scarcity, limited interpretability, and the need to enforce physical laws constrain purely data-driven models. Physics-informed machine learning (PIML) addresses these limitations by embedding governing equations directly into the learning process, yielding accurate, efficient, and scalable solutions for Industry 4.0 applications. This article reviews hybrid PIML architectures for electricity systems, including physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), Deep Operator Networks (DeepONets), Fourier Neural Operators, Extreme Learning Machine-enhanced PINNs, graph-based PINNs (PIGNNs), and domai…

item.title: Physics-Informed Generative Solver: Bridging Data-Driven Priors and Conservation Laws for Stable Spatiotemporal Field Reconstruction
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ziyuan Zhu, Keyu Hu, Zhifei Chen, Yuhao Shi, Ming Bao, Jing Zhao, Gang Wang, Haitan Xu, Jiadong Li, Qijun Zhao, Xiaodong Li, Minghui Lu, Yanfeng Chen
arXiv:2605.22338v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reconstructing continuous physical fields from sparse measurements is a central inverse problem, but data-driven generative models can produce states that violate governing dynamics. We introduce a physics-informed generative solver that separates stable prior learning from inference-time enforcement of conservation laws. Martingale-Regularized Score Matching regularizes score pretraining with a Score Fokker-Planck constraint, yielding a dynamically stable prior. Physics-Informed Implicit Score Sampling then guides denoising trajectories by gradients of physical residuals, projecting samples toward admissible manifolds without retraining. In acoustics, the method co-generates pressure and particle velocity from sparse sensors, enabling dense…

item.title: [ASAP] Ferroelectric Surface Potentials Enable Band-Alignment Engineering for Tunable Quantum Anomalous Hall States
item.description:
📚 Nano Letters: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Shuhan Shan, Yan Liang, and Pei Zhao
Nano Letters DOI: 10.1021/acs.nanolett.6c01650

item.title: 铁磁-电子耦合策略增强平面钙钛矿太阳能电池运行稳定性：磁控共溅射掺铁锌锡氧铁电电子传输层
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Ibrahim Cinar, Ibrahimhan Dilci, Kubra Genc, Yavuz Atasoy, Fantai Kong, Zhengguo Xiao, Savas Sonmezoglu
该工作采用铁磁-电子耦合策略，通过磁控共溅射制备掺铁锌锡氧铁电电子传输层，提升平面钙钛矿太阳能电池的运行稳定性。研究将铁电特性与器件工程结合，为高效稳定光伏器件开发提供了新途径。

item.title: 原位构建磁性核壳氢键有机框架@金属-有机框架结构高效催化过一硫酸盐活化
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yingying Du, Chenhui Ding, Chao Deng, Susanta Banerjee, Seema Agarwal
该工作原位构建了磁性核壳HOF@MOF复合结构，用于高效活化过一硫酸盐降解污染物。研究为设计新型异质结催化剂用于高级氧化工艺提供了新策略。

item.title: Adaptive Measurement Allocation for Learning Kernelized SVMs Under Noisy Observations
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Artur Miroszewski
arXiv:2605.22275v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Kernel methods are typically formulated under the assumption of exact, noise-free access to the Gram matrix. However, in emerging settings such as quantum machine learning, each kernel entry must be inferred from noisy observations, and its accuracy depends on how a limited measurement budget is allocated. Despite this, existing approaches overwhelmingly rely on uniform allocation, which equalizes estimator variance but ignores the highly non-uniform dependence of kernelized classifiers on the Gram matrix. In this work, we introduce an adaptive measurement-allocation strategy for learning kernelized Support Vector Machines (SVMs) from noisy Bernoulli observations. Our approach combines two complementary principles: (i) geometric sensitivity,…

item.title: MoSA: Motion-constrained Stress Adaptation for Mitigating Real-to-Sim Gap in Continuum Dynamics via Learning Residual Anisotropy
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jiaxu Wang, Junhao He, Jingkai Sun, Yi Gu, Yunyang Mo, Jiahang Cao, Qiang Zhang, Renjing Xu
arXiv:2605.22597v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Learning real-world dynamics from visual observations is crucial for various domains. A common strategy is to calibrate simulators by estimating physical parameters, yet accuracy is ultimately bounded by the underlying physical models, which often assume materials are homogeneous and isotropic. Even if reasonable, real-world objects typically exhibit mild anisotropy and heterogeneity. After the near-isotropic backbone is well calibrated, these residual effects become the key bottleneck for further closing the real-to-sim gap. Although neural networks can fit dynamics end-to-end, such black-box modeling discards strong physical priors, leading to poor data efficiency and overfitting. Therefore, we propose MoSA, a motion-constrained stress ada…

item.title: PDFTime：基于原型引导的分类子任务解耦框架用于多元时间序列
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xianhao Song, Yuang Zhang, Yuqi She, Liping Wang, Xuemin Lin
针对时间序列分类中直接特征到标签映射导致的可解释性差与特征提取-决策逻辑耦合问题，提出PDFTime框架。该框架将时间序列分类重构为多阶段决策过程，利用学习原型在隐空间中逼近类条件特征分布，通过不同粒度的分类子任务实现渐进式判别，是首个将时间序列分类解耦为多阶段相似性推理的框架。

item.title: Rigid muffin-tin approximation in plane-wave codes for fast modeling of phonon-mediated superconductors
item.description:
📚 npj Computational Materials
👤 Danylo Radevych, Tatsuya Shishidou, Michael Weinert, Elena R. Margine, Aleksey N. Kolmogorov, Igor I. Mazin
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 23 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02141-7 Rigid muffin-tin approximation in plane-wave codes for fast modeling of phonon-mediated superconductors

item.title: Holomorphic Neural ODEs with Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks for Interpretable Discovery of Complex Dynamics
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Bhaskar Ranjan Karn, Dinesh Kumar
arXiv:2605.22235v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Complex dynamical systems governed by holomorphic maps such as z² + c exhibit fractal boundaries with extreme sensitivity to initial conditions. Accurately modelling these structures from data requires methods that respect the underlying complex-analytic geometry, yet Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) within Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (Neural ODEs) lack complex-analytic priors, violate the Cauchy--Riemann conditions, and function as opaque approximators incapable of yielding governing equations. We introduce Holomorphic KAN-ODE, a framework that replaces the MLP with a Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) whose learnable B-spline activations reside on network edges, and incorporates Cauchy--Riemann equations as a differentiable regulariz…

item.title: Intel Neural Compute Stick 2在单脉冲电磁故障注入下的故障响应表征
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Štefan Kučerák, Jakub Breier, Xiaolu Hou
该工作对Intel NCS2开展系统性单脉冲电磁故障注入实验，运行ResNet-18/50及VGG-11模型。在1536次热点测试与约16000次参数搜索试验中，识别出四类可复现结果：无精度变化、轻微静默数据损坏、需重载模型恢复的持久性严重退化、以及需USB断电复位的设备挂死。

item.title: 面向千兆规模AI工厂的高速网络
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sajy Khashab, Albert Gran Alcoz, Alon Gal, Jacky Romano, Rani Abboud, Yonatan Piasetzky, Lior Maman, Amit Nishry, Barak Gafni, Omer Shabtai, Matty Kadosh, Dror Goldenberg, Gilad Shainer, Mark Silberstein
该工作介绍NVIDIA Spectrum-X以太网的多平面架构，以拓扑并行替代层次深度，并在NIC与交换机中引入硬件加速负载均衡。评估显示该架构可实现理论线速98%的低抖动延迟、强跨租户隔离及容量比例二分带宽，满足AI训练微秒级动态网络需求。

item.title: A Magnetic Resonance Imaging Reportable Strategy for In Situ CuET and Mn2+ Generation to Boost Antitumor Immunity
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Zhijie Zhang, Qingfu Zhao, Qingyuan Deng, Qingqing Xu, Haochen Lin, Yi Zhao, Ivan V. Zelepukin, Sergey M. Deyev, Xiangliang Yang, Zifu Li
Advanced Functional Materials, Volume 36, Issue 40, 18 May 2026.

item.title: Controllable Self‐Propulsion of a Biohybrid Millirobot Through Muscle‐Fiber‐Alignment Programming and Magnetically Assisted Steering
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Anping Wu, Zhengyuan Xin, Xinyi Dong, Zhiqiang Zheng, Juan Cui, Toshio Fukuda, Huaping Wang
Advanced Functional Materials, EarlyView.

item.title: 肖特基势垒调控跨电磁频带可调吸收的电子开关
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Zhenyu Cheng, Rong Liu, Yijie Liu, Yi Yan, Jiaqi Tao, Junru Yao, Shuang Chen, Lvtong Duan, Wei Bo, Qing Ma, Weize Wang, Xu Li, Wenjian Zheng, Yuxian An, Zhengjun Yao, Yuting Shi, Tianjing Huang, Qiqi Teng, Jintang Zhou
该工作利用肖特基势垒调控，实现了跨电磁频带可调吸收的电子开关器件。研究为开发宽频谱可调电磁功能器件提供了新机制。

item.title: High-resolution ODMR spectra of individual hybrid 14 NV- 13 C spin systems with third-shell 13 C in diamond for nanoscale vector magnetometry: Theory and experiment
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 A. P. Nizovtsev, A. L. Pushkarchuk, N. S. Kukin, A. R. Muradova, A. K. Nikitin, A. A. Bukhtiyarov 等10位作者
In recent decades, second-generation quantum technologies based on the practical use of individual quantum systems—atoms, molecules, impurity centers, and photons—have become one of a central focus of modern science. Among these, quantum magnetometry has emerged as one of the most advanced directions. In this field, nitrogen–vacancy (NV) centers in diamond, as well as their complexes with nuclear spins, are widely employed as sensors for measuring magnetic fields with nanometer-scale spatial resolution. However, due to the C3V symmetry of the NV center, information about the azimuthal angle of the magnetic field vector is not accessible. Here, we propose and experimentally demonstrate, for a first time, a method of vector magnetometry based on acquisition and theoretical analysis of high-…

item.title: 核壳SiC@Cu纳米线肖特基异质结工程实现超宽带电磁波吸收与快速热耗散
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Chenyang Jing, Zhijian Xu, Meng Zhu, Changxi Zhang, Chunhai Wang, Hailong Xu
该工作通过构建核壳SiC@Cu纳米线肖特基异质结，实现了超宽带电磁波吸收和快速热耗散功能。研究为开发兼具电磁防护与热管理性能的复合材料提供了新策略。

item.title: Advancing Mathematics Research with AI-Driven Formal Proof Search
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 George Tsoukalas, Anton Kovsharov, Sergey Shirobokov, Anja Surina, Moritz Firsching, Gergely Bérczi, Francisco J. R. Ruiz, Arun Suggala, Adam Zsolt Wagner, Eric Wieser, Lei Yu, Aja Huang, Miklós Z. Horváth, Andrew Ferrauiolo, Henryk Michalewski, Codrut Grosu, Thomas Hubert, Matej Balog, Pushmeet Kohli, Swarat Chaudhuri
arXiv:2605.22763v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly excel at mathematical reasoning, but their unreliability limits their utility in mathematics research. A mitigation is using LLMs to generate formal proofs in languages like Lean. We perform the first large-scale evaluation of this method's ability to solve open problems. Our most capable agent autonomously resolved 9 of 353 open Erdős problems at the per-problem cost of a few hundred dollars, proved 44/492 OEIS conjectures, and is being deployed in combinatorics, optimization, graph theory, algebraic geometry, and quantum optics research. A basic agent alternating LLM-based generation with Lean-based verification replicated the Erdős successes but proved costlier on the hardest problems. These findi…

item.title: Maestro：基于强化学习的层次化模型-技能集成编排
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jinyang Wu, Guocheng Zhai, Ruihan Jin, Yuhao Shen, Zhengxi Lu, Fan Zhang, Haoran Luo, Zheng Lian, Zhengqi Wen, Jianhua Tao
针对现有自主智能体框架依赖单一LLM和固定逻辑、无法利用多模型与技能互补优势的问题，提出Maestro框架。该框架将异构多模态任务重构为层次化模型-技能注册表上的序列决策过程，训练轻量级策略动态组合冻结专家模型与双层技能库，基于结果强化学习优化，无需步骤级标注即可决定何时调用外部专家、选择何种模型-技能对及终止时机。

item.title: Spreadsheet-RL：基于强化学习提升大语言模型智能体在真实电子表格任务上的能力
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Banghao Chi, Yining Xie, Mingyuan Wu, Jingcheng Yang, Jize Jiang, Zhaoheng Li, Shengyi Qian, Minjia Zhang, Klara Nahrstedt, Rui Hou, Xiangjun Fan, Hanchao Yu
该工作提出面向Microsoft Excel环境的强化学习微调框架Spreadsheet-RL，用于训练专业电子表格智能体。框架包含从在线论坛自动采集起始-目标表格对的流水线，以及涵盖金融与供应链管理的领域特定评测任务，并构建支持多轮RL的Spreadsheet Gym环境。

item.title: Tabular foundation models for robust calibration of near-infrared chemical sensing data
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Robin Reiter, Denis Cornet, Fabien Michel, Lauriane Rouan, Gregory Beurier
arXiv:2605.21544v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Near-infrared spectroscopy is increasingly used as a rapid, non-destructive chemical sensing technology for the analysis of food, pharmaceutical, biological, and environmental samples. However, the practical deployment of NIR sensors still depends on calibration models able to handle high-dimensional, collinear spectra, limited sample sizes, preprocessing dependence, spectral outliers, and extrapolation beyond the calibration domain. Here, we evaluate whether tabular foundation models can provide a new calibration strategy for NIR chemical sensing. We benchmark TabPFN on 66 NIR datasets covering 54 regression and 12 classification tasks, and compare direct inference on raw spectra with preprocessing-optimized inference against PLS/PLS-DA, Ri…

item.title: AgForce Enables Antigen-conditioned Generative Antibody Design
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mansoor Ahmed, Murray Patterson
arXiv:2605.21610v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Antibody design methods condition on antigen structure to generate complementarity-determining regions (CDR), yet a systematic evaluation of baseline methods reveals that they largely ignore the antigen input. We identify three failure modes that explain this behavior. Antigen blindness arises because models derive predictions from antibody framework context rather than antigen information, producing nearly identical CDRs regardless of the target. Vocabulary collapse reduces predicted amino acids to three to five per position, far below the ground truth distribution in native sequences. Moreover, any model trained with standard per-position cross-entropy converges to the positional marginal distribution, making it provably unable to produce…

item.title: ARC-STAR: Auditable Post-Hoc Correction for PDE Foundation Models
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Chengze Li, Lingwei Wei, Li Sun, Hongbo Lv, Jie Yang, Hongrong Zhang, Kening Zheng, Wei-Chieh Huang, Enze Ma, Philip S. Yu
arXiv:2605.22222v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Partial differential equation (PDE) foundation models are pretrained networks that forecast how physical fields like velocity and pressure evolve from a single reusable solver. On unfamiliar flows their predictions drift step by step, errors concentrate in a few regions, yet retraining destabilizes the network and uniform post-hoc correction overlooks this spatial concentration. To address this, we propose a frozen-solver post-hoc correction framework, Adaptive Risk-Calibrated Spatial Triage for Auditable Refinement (ARC-STAR). ARC-STAR organizes correction into three stages: a global corrector removes broad solver bias, a blockwise local refiner cleans the post-global residual, and, at deployment, a label-free score routes refinement to hig…

item.title: ConTact: Contact-First Antibody CDR Design via Explicit Interface Reasoning
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mansoor Ahmed, Spencer VonBank, Nadeem Taj, Sujin Lee, Naila Jan, Murray Patterson
arXiv:2605.21600v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Computational antibody CDR design methods condition on antigen structure to generate binding loops, yet existing architectures conflate two fundamentally distinct sub-problems: identifying which CDR positions will contact the antigen, and selecting amino acids at those positions. This conflation forces models to learn contact reasoning implicitly through uniform message passing, diluting antigen signal across all positions equally. We introduce ConTact, a contact-then-act architecture that explicitly decomposes CDR design into three cascaded stages: learning surface complementarity fingerprints, predicting CDR-antigen contacts, and injecting contact-gated antigen features into the sequence head. A distance-biased cross-attention module encod…

item.title: Teaching Language Models to Forecast Research Success Through Comparative Idea Evaluation
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Srujan P Mule, Aniketh Garikaparthi, Manasi Patwardhan
arXiv:2605.21491v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As language models accelerate scientific research by automating hypothesis generation and implementation, a new bottleneck emerges: evaluating and filtering hundreds of AI-generated ideas without exhaustive experimentation. We ask whether LMs can learn to forecast the empirical success of research ideas before any experiments are run. We study comparative empirical forecasting: given a benchmark-specific research goal and two candidate ideas, predict which will achieve better benchmark performance. We construct a dataset of 11,488 idea pairs grounded in objective outcomes from PapersWithCode. While off-the-shelf 8B-parameter models struggle (30% acc.), SFT dramatically boosts performance to 77.1%, outperforming GPT-5 (61.1%). By framing eval…

item.title: Winner-Take-All瓶颈强制多任务学习中的解耦符号表征
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Julian Gutheil (Graz University of Technology), Simon Hitzginger (Graz University of Technology), Robert Legenstein (Graz University of Technology)
证明深度神经网络中的WTA瓶颈在明确定义条件下可强制提取数据中的类别潜在因子，使表征高度符号化——单个神经元或神经元群编码单一抽象特征（如特定物体、颜色或位置）。在不符合定理假设的架构和设置上的实证表明该特性依然成立，并展示所获符号表征的优势。该工作为理解皮层WTA回路动机及Transformer注意力层中softmax类激活的作用提供了新视角。

item.title: Gesture Recognition using EMGMOAT from Wrist Surface Electromyographic Signals
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Chuang Lin, Wei Xu, Yue He, Jiahao Chen, Na Li
Objective. Surface electromyographic (sEMG) signals have gained significant traction as robust human-machine interface (HMI) systems, particularly with integrating deep learning techniques for gesture recognition. Significance. Among various applications, wrist-based wearables stand out for their practicality, making it essential to explore deep learning models that can effectively recognize gestures from wrist sEMG signals. Approach. This paper introduces the EMGMOAT (ElectroMyoGraphy MObile convolution with ATtention) model, designed specifically for hand gesture recognition (HGR) utilizing wrist sEMG signals. Main results. Our findings indicate that the classification accuracy of the EMGMOAT model is markedly higher than that of classical methods. Additionally, we performed a comparati…

item.title: Chebyshev Policies and the Mountain Car Problem: Reinforcement Learning for Low-Dimensional Control Tasks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Stefan Huber, Hannes Unger, Georg Schäfer, Jakob Rehrl
arXiv:2605.22305v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We analytically solve the Mountain Car problem, a canonical benchmark in RL, and derive an optimal control solution, closing a gap after 36 years. This enables us to reveal two surprising insights: The optimal control is quite simple, yet modern RL agents display a large gap to optimality. Motivated by the analysis of the optimal control, we introduce Chebyshev policies as a universal (i.e. dense) class of RL policies from first principles. They can be trained as drop-in replacements of neural nets, reducing the regret by a factor of 4.18, while requiring 277 times fewer parameters, fostering sample efficiency, explainability and realtime capability. Chebyshev policies are evaluated on further RL tasks, including a real-world nonlinear motio…

item.title: 协同自旋-轨道重构与自适应晶格转变激活惰性材料用于稳定镁存储正极
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Wenwei Zhang, Zenan Xu, Xiaobin Liao, Junjun Wang, Feiyang Chao, Jianyong Zhang, Shaohua Zhu, Lianmeng Cui, Jiang Liang, Huiqing Zhou, Xinran Chen, Min Zhou, Jinghao Li, Chen Tang, Congli Sun, Qinyou An
该工作通过协同自旋-轨道重构和自适应晶格转变，将惰性材料转化为耐用的镁离子电池正极。研究为开发高稳定性镁存储电极材料提供了新机制与设计思路。

item.title: Ir纳米线网络完全相转化为富缺陷氧化物催化剂用于高性能PEM电解水
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Heting Pu, Yuxiao He, Yi Chen, Shaohua Xie, Ao Zhang, Kai‐Yuan Hsiao, Chengzhang Wan, Yu‐Han Joseph Tsai, Yibo Wang, Yang Liu, Ning Su, Joshua Wright, Qingying Jia, Deborah J. Myers, Carlo U. Segre, Fudong Liu, Haimei Zheng, Xiangfeng Duan, Yu Huang
该工作将Ir纳米线网络完全转化为富含缺陷的氧化物催化剂，应用于质子交换膜电解水制氢。研究旨在提升铱基催化剂的活性和稳定性，以降低PEM电解槽的贵金属用量并提高性能。详情需查阅原文。

item.title: Electrochemical Annealing Tailors PtCu Interlocked Networks Toward the Sabatier Optimum for Stable Oxygen Reduction
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yiting Song, Heng Liu, Tianrui Xue, Xiaoqing Mao, Yongjun Shen, Di Zhang, Jialin Cui, Hao Li, Huihui Li, Chunzhong Li
Advanced Functional Materials, EarlyView.

item.title: 可持续无催化剂PLG网络：可回收性、生物降解性与功能性能
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Lars Schwarzer, Emilia Fulajtar, Seema Agarwal
该工作研究了无需催化剂的聚乳酸-乙醇酸共聚物网络，系统评估了其可回收性、生物降解性及功能性能。研究为开发环境友好型高分子材料提供了可持续解决方案。

item.title: 基于视觉原语的动作生成
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Weilong Guo, Yuchen Wang, Renping Zhou, Yunfeng Zhang, Rui Fang, Yue Meng, Wenda Xu, Yuan He, Gao Huang
该工作提出AVP架构，将视觉-语言-动作模型中的动作生成解耦为视觉原语驱动的流程。VLM推断下一阶段目标并输出视觉原语token，以流匹配动作专家生成动作，监督信号来自末端执行器运动学。真实机器人实验显示其在拾放任务中成功率较pi⁰·⁵提升27.61%。

item.title: 基于神经需求势的可积弹性：多产品零售需求建模
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Carlos Heredia, Daniel Roncel
提出可积上下文相关需求网络（ICDN），一种需求优先的神经模型用于多产品零售需求预测。模型将需求对数学习为价格对数的平滑上下文条件函数，允许从学习需求曲面精确导出弹性。在Dominick啤酒数据集上，ICDN相比有向对数-对数基准改善了样本外泛化，并产生更稳定、经济合理的弹性估计，尤其对弱识别的交叉价格效应改善显著。

item.title: KAPPS：面向循环工厂的知识型信息物理生产系统架构
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Etienne Hoffmann, Jan-Felix Klein, Sören Weindel, Max Goebels, Sebastian Behrendt, Daniel Hernández, Ratan Bahadur Thapa, Jürgen Fleischer, Kai Furmans, Steffen Staab
该工作针对循环制造中产品状态异质、工艺动态重构等挑战，提出基于知识图谱的统一数据架构KAPPS。通过本体论 grounding 的知识图谱与语义接口层，实现异构系统间的数据集成、推理与通信。研究从五个互补视角导出14项需求，并遵循设计科学方法论完成架构开发。

item.title: 时间编码作为感觉运动物体推断的基质：千脑架构的脉冲重诠释
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Joy Bose
该工作针对Thousand Brains Theory中密集浮点向量编码丢弃接触序列空间信息的问题，提出以秩次脉冲包替代密集向量。通过STDP学习规则，神经元发放时序隐含编码传感器位移，无需显式坐标计算，为感觉运动推理提供更具生物学合理性的表征方式。
